name: python3-redis
title: python3-redis
summary: Python bindings for Redis, a persistent key-value database
description:
Python bindings for Redis, a persistent key-value database
Redis is a key-value database in a similar vein to memcache but the dataset
is non-volatile. Redis additionally provides native support for atomically
manipulating and querying data structures such as lists and sets.
.
The dataset is stored entirely in memory and periodically flushed to disk.
.
This package contains Python bindings to Redis.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-redis because Python bindings for Redis, a persistent key-value database.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-redis as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-redis with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-redis --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
